title: AGF Physics-3d components
description: Component definitions for the physics-3d domain. Pulled in by scene.schema.json via $ref; inlined into the bundled schema by engine/tools/schemas/load-scene-schema.ts.

characterController3DComponent.description: M24-character: Rapier kinematic character controller. Pairs with `RigidBody3D { type: "kinematicPosition" }` + `Collider3D { kind: "capsule" }`. Gameplay code writes per-step intent through `runtime.physics.moveCharacter(entityId, [dx, dy, dz])` (or the runtime-only `CharacterIntent3D` component); CharacterMovementSystem runs the Rapier controller, applies corrected movement, writes the resolved transform + a `Grounded3D` runtime component.

offset.description: Skin distance kept between the character and other colliders (Rapier offset parameter).

maxSlopeDegrees.description: Steepest slope angle the character can climb.

snapToGroundDistance.description: Vertical distance to snap to ground after a downward correction (handles small steps). 0 disables snapping.

applyImpulsesToDynamicBodies.description: If true, the character pushes dynamic bodies it touches (instead of just sliding off them).

mass.description: Effective mass for impulse calculations when push-pushing dynamic bodies.

rigidBody3DComponent.description: M24-schema: declares an entity as a Rapier rigid body. Pair with a sibling Collider3D for the actual collision shape. 'fixed' = static level geometry. 'dynamic' = simulated, writes Transform after fixed step. 'kinematicPosition' = controlled by gameplay/character systems, participates in collisions.

type.description: Body kind. AGF_RIGIDBODY3D_DYNAMIC_TRIMESH rejects dynamic+trimesh combos at validation time.

mass.description: Mass in kg. Required for dynamic bodies; ignored for fixed bodies. Validator emits AGF_RIGIDBODY3D_MASS_REQUIRED when missing on dynamic.

gravityScale.description: 0 = floats, 1 = standard, >1 = heavier. Negative values flip gravity for this body.

lockRotations.description: Freeze all rotations — useful for upright character controllers.

ccd.description: Continuous collision detection. Costlier but prevents fast-moving bodies tunneling through thin colliders.

canSleep.description: Allow Rapier to put the body to sleep when idle.

collider3DComponent.description: M24-schema: collision shape for a sibling RigidBody3D entity. Primitives (box/sphere/capsule/cylinder), trimesh (arbitrary static geometry — must pair with RigidBody3D.type="fixed"), and heightfield (terrain). Set `sensor: true` for trigger volumes that emit events without resolving collision.

offset.description: Local-space offset relative to the body's Transform.position.

rotation.description: Local-space rotation (degrees, XYZ Euler) relative to the body's Transform.rotation.

sensor.description: Trigger volume — emits enter/exit events but doesn't push other bodies.

layer.description: Named collision layer (e.g. 'world', 'player'). Resolved against project.json#physics.layers at engine check time.

mask.description: Layers this collider interacts with. AGF_COLLIDER3D_LAYER_UNKNOWN catches unknown names.

size.description: Full extent on each axis (Rapier wants half-extents; adapter divides by 2).

halfHeight.description: Distance from center to cap-base (excluding hemispheres).

vertices.description: Flat XYZ vertex array (`[x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, ...]`). Length must be a multiple of 3 and ≥ 9 (one triangle). Authored in body-local space — Rapier applies the body's pose at step time.

indices.description: Triangle index array (`[i0, i1, i2, i3, i4, i5, ...]`). Length must be a multiple of 3.

rows.description: Number of height samples along the Z axis. `heights.length` must equal `rows * columns`.

columns.description: Number of height samples along the X axis.

heights.description: Row-major Y samples (`heights[row * columns + col]`). Pre-scale values.

scale.description: World-space size of the full heightfield. Y is the vertical scale applied to `heights` entries.
